site.name: AI Toolbox
site.tagline: Launch AI product demos in days, not weeks.
site.description: A multilingual AI tools hub with opinionated UX, ready to extend into production.

meta.title: Login | AI Toolbox
meta.description: Sign in to AI Toolbox to unlock upcoming features and early access.
meta.accessibility: Go back to the home page

login.title: Sign in to your AI Toolbox account
login.description: Currently we support Google sign-in. More identity providers are coming soon. Reach out to <mailto>product@aitoolbox.com</mailto> if you need a custom plan.
login.disclaimer: By continuing you agree to our privacy policy and terms of service.

highlights.title: Single sign-on
highlights.description: Use Google credentials to get started instantly without new passwords.

highlights.title: Roles & subscriptions
highlights.description: Plans will map to quotas and features so your production usage stays safe.

highlights.title: Faster iteration
highlights.description: Log in to access upcoming tools, share feedback, and follow the roadmap.

hero.title: Build a polished AI tools experience fast
hero.subtitle: Validate workflows, SEO structure, and localization on top of a robust Next.js foundation.

tool.title: Text Summarizer Demo
tool.description: Wire the hero tool card to a server action or API Route to preview real inference workflows.
tool.modelHelper: Choose your preferred model per tool in config/tools.config.json.
tool.errorFallback: We could not generate a summary. Please try again later.
tool.helperText: Supports up to 4,000 characters. Add more context for better summaries.
hints: Requests enforce a minimum 600 ms loading state for UX consistency.
Update config/tools.config.json to map providers and models per tool.
Inject your own API keys (OpenAI, Azure, etc.) via environment variables.

toolCatalog.title: Tool Catalogue
toolCatalog.description: Explore additional AI demos bundled with this template.

items.title: Text Summarizer
items.description: Condense long-form content into concise summaries in seconds.

items.title: Idea Generator
items.description: Brainstorm product ideas, taglines, and campaign hooks.

items.title: Transcript Polisher
items.description: Clean up meeting transcripts into publish-ready notes.

examples.title: Example Use Cases
examples.description: Illustrative scenarios to validate the experience ahead of real integrations.

items.title: Marketing copy
items.description: Craft launch blurbs and press snippets ready for human polish.

items.title: Product research
items.description: Digest customer interviews into key takeaways.

items.title: Newsletter recaps
items.description: Transform long-form articles into shareable summaries.

features.title: Foundation Features
features.description: Ship confident MVPs with production-ready guardrails.

items.title: Locale-aware routing
items.description: Default English at root with Chinese at /zh, auto-detected and persisted.

items.title: SEO-ready metadata
items.description: Title, description, keywords, canonical, and hreflang ready for production.

items.title: Scalable tool cards
items.description: Configuration-driven layout ready to host future AI tasks and models.

blog.title: Latest Notes
blog.description: Content placeholders ready to swap in CMS-driven posts.

items.name: Design Snapshot
items.description: Iterate on hero and navigation styling.

footer.tagline: AI Toolbox — built for rapid experimentation and scale.

phases.name: Phase 1
phases.description: Deliver MVP with localization, SEO, and demo tool.

phases.name: Phase 2
phases.description: Add user accounts, billing, and analytics.

phases.name: Phase 3
phases.description: Expand content, knowledge base, and multilingual CMS.
